component.name: TaskPilot
component.summary: Manage systemd services, timers, mounts, cron jobs and more

description.p: TaskPilot is a comprehensive system task manager for the KDE desktop. It provides a single graphical front-end for the many moving parts of a modern Linux system: systemd services and timers, mounts, cron jobs, autostart entries, listening ports, the journal, snaps and containers.

screenshot.caption: Managing systemd services with status, scope and Hide-Defaults filters

description.p: Per-tab right-click menus (Logs, Dependencies, Edit Unit File, Env Files, Run Now, Terminate/Kill a port's process, container Remove); a Tools menu to create units and view failed units and startup-time analysis; elevated actions (Ports, Docker, other users' crontabs) via polkit; and an application icon.
All tabs ported to C++/KF6: Services, Timers, Mounts, Cron, Autostart, Ports, Journal, Snaps, Containers (docker/podman/incus), plus a new Sessions tab for logind sessions.
Initial C++/KDE Frameworks port: Services tab over systemd D-Bus.
